notes: Machine-checkable R0-R5 ledger for PHASE_5_PLAN section 11.1; enforced by tests/Unit/Core/Phase5EvidenceMapTest.php. GA-DOD-* rows mirror the section 14 Gate A checklist in order. Bump a state only in the commit that lands its evidence.

requirements.title: Phase 4 acceptance or explicit deferrals recorded
Carryover ledger, trust models, taxonomy, protected capabilities, RP ID, provider/invitation decisions, budgets approved
Schema reconciled with SCHEMA.md; all Gate A migrations pass clean-install/upgrade/rollback/backup
requirements.notes: 76-migration clean install (migrate:fresh), full rollback and reapply (migrate:rollback cascades all 76, then migrate reapplies all 76), verify:upgrade through 0076, and backup/restore rehearsal passed on 2026-07-09; SCHEMA.md v1.36 reconciles the landed Gate A schema.

requirements.title: Registry identity, signed/expiring snapshots, trust roots, rotation/revocation, digests, pinning, advisories, offline behavior
requirements.notes: Inc 2 landed 2026-07-02: fail-closed Ed25519 trust chain, signed+expiring snapshots with anti-replay + offline cache, source-pinning/uid-conflict refusal, signed key rotation + revocation, advisory ladder, registry-independent blocklist, worker:registry-refresh, staff-only read-only browse - now operator-reversible via features.package_registry=false after the 2026-07-09 default-on flip. Inc 3 layers install/manifest/lifecycle on the same protocol under GA-DOD-05/06. Browser+axe evidence captured; signature_verify_p95 MEASURED (PASS); fetch_p95 measured during Gate A closeout evidence (section 13.1 step 3).

requirements.title: Manifest v2, package types, permission/data/network/job declarations, lifecycle, risk summary
requirements.notes: Inc 3 landed 2026-07-02: strict rb-manifest.v2 validation, package type policy, capability/data/api/event/host/job consent vocabulary, install/consent/enable/disable/update/rollback/uninstall/export lifecycle, and no-JS admin risk summary behind package_registry. Inc 4 now gives theme packages a declarative CSS runtime; non-theme integrations still execute nothing until Inc 5 runtimes.

requirements.title: Tampered/stale/incompatible/source-switched/revoked/unreviewed packages fail closed
requirements.notes: Inc 3 fail-closed checks cover same-origin source_url, exact digest acquisition/cache, unapproved review, incompatible core, advisory/blocklist install and enable refusal, health-worker quarantine, staged-update cancellation, and force-disable enforcement.

requirements.title: Declarative themes: verification, asset scan, preview isolation, contrast/a11y, CSP/cache, safe mode, rollback
requirements.notes: Inc 4 landed 2026-07-02 behind package_themes: strict theme manifest block validation, closed token grammars, raster asset scan + re-encode, deterministic css_digest builds, CSP-safe same-origin serving, admin preview isolation, password-reauth activation/rollback, flag-independent safe mode, fail-safe deactivation/repair, browser+axe evidence, and theme.build_apply_p95 budget measurement.

requirements.title: Declarative/remote integration install, consent, pin/update/rollback, disable, export/uninstall, secrets, scope, outage
Exact-digest maintainer review, automated evidence, manual approval, publication, advisory, emergency disable
requirements.notes: Install-side exact-digest enforcement + review-evidence cache landed Inc 3; publisher console/advisory review + emergency disable landed Inc 5.

requirements.title: Protected built-in roles/capabilities seeded; old-vs-new resolver parity complete
requirements.notes: Inc 1 landed: shadow resolver + zero-mismatch parity corpus on the F9 fixture + role editor/simulator. Increment 6 (2026-07-05): enforcement landed, mode-gated via CAPABILITIES_MODE (shadow default / enforce), across the board/content surface plus the four board-roster POST commands; the two recorded divergences are resolved via ADR 0016 (the pending-view tightening accepted and test-pinned; the content-state boundary ratified). R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.capabilities=false.

requirements.title: Custom role creation, scope, grantor authority, expiry, cache invalidation, audit, simulator, fallback
requirements.notes: R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.capabilities=false.

requirements.title: Protected owner/last-admin and recent-reauthentication safeguards
requirements.notes: LastOwnerGuard (F5) and ReauthGate (F7) landed; owner-loss paths 2-5 and high-impact wiring land in Inc 6-9. Demote path wired Inc 6; provider-unlink Inc 8, invitations Inc 9.

requirements.title: Passkey registration/login/list/remove/step-up/fallback/recovery scenarios on supported browsers
requirements.notes: R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.passkeys=false. Privileged-MFA enforcement and usernameless remain Gate B

requirements.title: Provider-registry migration preserves identities; generic OIDC negative tests pass
requirements.notes: Inc 8 (2026-07-07): 0074 backfills provider_config_id via the 0052 alias map with no duplication/orphaning (reconciliation test + verify:upgrade through 0075); TM-ID-01..04 negatives implemented end-to-end through the HTTP kernel (issuer/aud/azp, state replay + nonce + PKCE, off-issuer JWKS refusal + pinned rotation refresh, collision proof-to-link). R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.provider_registry=false.

requirements.title: Selected additional provider works through the normalized identity contract
requirements.notes: A2 = GitLab.com (accepted 2026-07-02), implemented Inc 8 (2026-07-07) as a pure generic-OIDC configuration through the shared NormalizedIdentity/OAuthService core — no provider-specific fork. GitLab-shaped end-to-end flows + operator console (add/test/enable/disable with sole-method listing, TM-ID-09 clause 2 resolved) + browser evidence PNGs 66-68. R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.provider_registry=false. The live gitlab.com registration walkthrough remains in the runbook.

requirements.title: Invitation create/revoke/redeem/bind/expire/use-limit/abuse/no-privilege-escalation tests
requirements.notes: Inc 9 (2026-07-08): TM-IN-01..07 implemented end-to-end through the HTTP kernel (uniform enumeration + probe rate limits; real-transaction single-use race admits exactly one account and a registration failure restores the consumed use; expired/revoked/exhausted uniform refusals with no account; email + exact-domain binding incl. subdomain rejection; forged POST and DB-planted role grants yield ordinary membership only; hash-only at rest incl. audit rows and list views; member issuance 403 + burst issuance 429). Explicit registration_mode=invite via the RegistrationPolicy seam — closed stays absolute, invite fails closed when features.invitations=false, and OAuth provisioning honors the same seam (registration_invite_only). Onboarding-role grants deferred pending an approved policy (decision #36; docs/phase5/invitation-defaults.md). invitation.redemption_p95 461.79 ms MEASURED (PASS) (production-cost Argon2id; pre-merge hardening replaced the harness-weakened 5.59 ms figure). R5 satisfied 2026-07-09 by the default-on flip; operator rollback remains Set features.invitations=false.

requirements.title: Accessibility, responsive, keyboard, screen-reader, no-JS evidence for Gate A surfaces
Registry/signature/install/theme/role/passkey/provider/invitation budgets pass on production-like fixtures
requirements.notes: Production-like Gate A budgets (registry/signature/install/theme/role/passkey/provider/invitation) re-measured green via verify:phase5-budgets at the P5-16 closeout on 2026-07-09; advanced R3 -> R4 per this row's reserved closeout note. Remaining gate_b sandbox.walltime_default and staged-enablement registry.fetch_p95 stay out of Gate A.

requirements.title: Rotation, revoke/rollback, outage, safe mode, resolver fallback, owner/passkey recovery, provider disable, invitation pause, backup/restore runbooks rehearsed
Full Phase 1-4 regression and route-permission matrix green with all public packages disabled
README, changelog, schema, capability catalogue, review policy, runbooks, evidence index updated
protected_owners seed + LastOwnerGuard
requirements.notes: Wired on account deactivate/delete, passkey-removal (Inc 7, PasskeyService), and the role/user-moderation paths (UserModerationService); provider-unlink is covered by OAuthService::unlink's own login-method guard (Inc 8). Invitations (Inc 9): N/A by design — redemption grants no roles and removes no access (no approved onboarding-role policy; decision #36, docs/phase5/invitation-defaults.md), so there is no owner-threatening mutation site to guard until role-granting redemption ever ships.

requirements.notes: SP0 redaction/revoke/prune corpus landed TM-SE-02/04/05 (2026-07-03): no plaintext in metadata/audit/exceptions, forced-failure yields svcsec ref only, revoke zeroes retired ciphertext.

requirements.notes: R4: direct-request authorization matrix (scope denial/Bearer/private-board/flag-dark/429) + no-JS mint/reveal/revoke browser+axe evidence. Contributes scope/outage evidence toward GA-DOD-08.

requirements.notes: SP0 retrofit landed: formal SSRF/egress adversarial corpus (validateStatic + validate incl. DNS-rebind), delivery-idempotency proof + report, and no-JS register/reveal/rotate/send-test + axe browser evidence. Evidence-only, no production change.

requirements.title: First-party hook registry + domain producers
requirements.notes: Private-content-absence proof landed 2026-07-03: hidden/private boards + DM reports suppress; emitted events carry IDs+enums only.

package_registry.rollback: Set features.package_registry=false in settings. Registry, catalogue, and install routes stay dark; installed rows remain inert.

package_themes.rollback: Set features.package_themes=false. Theme routes stay dark and the system theme serves; safe mode remains flag-independent.

capabilities.rollback: Set features.capabilities=false. Resolver and role routes stay dark; authorization falls back to legacy users.role, board_moderators, and post_min_role authority.

passkeys.rollback: Set features.passkeys=false. WebAuthn ceremonies stop; credential rows are preserved for later recovery; password/OAuth/TOTP/recovery sign-in paths remain available.

provider_registry.rollback: Set features.provider_registry=false. Registry-driven providers disable; built-in Google/Apple/GitHub continue on the accepted fixed-provider path.

invitations.rollback: Set features.invitations=false. Issuance and redemption pause; token hashes and audit rows are preserved for investigation and expiry.

service_secrets.rollback: Set features.service_secrets=false. New secrets refuse; reveal/revoke/prune remain available so dependent consumers can be decommissioned safely.

api_tokens.rollback: Set features.api_tokens=false. /api/v1 authenticates nothing; tokens stay revocable through the admin surface.

webhooks.rollback: Set features.webhooks=false. Dispatch no-ops and the worker drains nothing new; endpoint config and delivery ledger are preserved.

first_party_hooks.rollback: Set features.first_party_hooks=false. Domain producers no-op; no queued state exists to reconcile.

server_extensions.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until the sandbox runtime passes adversarial acceptance.

governance.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until groups, approvals, and access review land after Gate A.

service_principals.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until remote-app identities land after Gate A.

verified_links.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until verified profile links land after Gate A.
